g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Internet traffic is routed over VLAN 10 to the vlan10-cudn workloads?')
sendPrompt('What internal network traffic is routed over VLAN 20 to the vlan20-cudn workloads?')
sendPrompt('How are IPAddressPool vlan-10-pool and L2Advertisement vlan-10-adv configured on enp7s0.10? What are VIPs .102 and .103?')
sendPrompt('How are IPAddressPool vlan-20-pool and L2Advertisement vlan-20-adv configured on enp7s0.20? What are VIPs .104 and .105?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.10 (VLAN 10, 192.168.10.11/24) configured on worker1 via NMState NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.20 (VLAN 20, 192.168.20.11/24) configured on worker1 via NMState NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.10 (VLAN 10, 192.168.10.12/24) configured on worker2 via NMState NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How is enp7s0.20 (VLAN 20, 192.168.20.12/24) configured on worker2 via NMState NodeNetworkConfigurationPolicy?')
sendPrompt('How does hello-openshift-service in vlan10cudn1 claim VIP 192.168.10.102 via metallb.universe.tf/loadBalancerIPs annotation?')
sendPrompt('How does the pod in vlan10cudn1 get its ovn-udn1 interface at 172.16.1.x/24 from the CUDN? Show ip a output.')
sendPrompt('How does hello-openshift-service in vlan10cudn2 claim VIP 192.168.10.103 via metallb annotation?')
sendPrompt('How does the pod in vlan10cudn2 get its ovn-udn1 IP from the shared CUDN subnet 172.16.1.0/24?')
sendPrompt('How does hello-openshift-service in vlan20cudn1 claim VIP 192.168.20.104 via metallb annotation?')
sendPrompt('How does the pod in vlan20cudn1 get its ovn-udn1 interface at 172.16.2.x/24 from the CUDN?')
sendPrompt('How does hello-openshift-service in vlan20cudn2 claim VIP 192.168.20.105 via metallb annotation?')
sendPrompt('How does the pod in vlan20cudn2 get its ovn-udn1 IP on the shared CUDN subnet 172.16.2.0/24?')

svg.text: ★ OVN forwards to UDN endpoint slice, not eth0
